global_description: A medium-sized bird with a slender, elongated body and a long tail. It has a distinctive yellow bill and a predominantly brown upper body with a white underbelly. The wings are broad and rounded, featuring subtle white tips. The tail is long and graduated, with white spots on the underside.

part_details.body: Slender, elongated, brown upper, white under
part_details.wings: Broad, rounded, brown with white tips

spatial_relations: The yellow bill is positioned at the front of the head
The broad wings extend from the sides of the body
The long tail extends from the rear of the body
